disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Interdigital scaling/maceration + moccasin-pattern hyperkeratotic soles + gym-shower exposure — tinea pedis (not contact dermatitis)
trigger_question_examples: Is the itching/scaling worst between the toes with soggy white skin, and are the soles thickened?
Do you use communal showers or share footwear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's worst between the toes with soggy white skin, my soles are thickened, and I use gym showers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No secondary bacterial cellulitis (no confluent hot spreading tender redness up the foot/leg, no red streaking, no fever) and not diabetic/immunocompromised (screens diabetic-foot/ascending infection)
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading up the top of your foot/leg as a hot painful patch or a red streak, and any fever?
Do you have diabetes or an immune problem?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No spreading hot redness or red streak up the foot, no fever, and I'm not diabetic.
